demo.title: helixa.sh
demo.code:
# Check any agent's Cred Score (free, no auth)
curl https://api.helixa.xyz/api/v2/agent/81/cred

# Read Helixa Multipass discovery for agent-readable public profiles
curl https://helixa.xyz/.well-known/multipass.json

# Fetch a compact public agent card
curl https://helixa.xyz/api/multipass/bendr-2-1/agent-card

# Read a cached Deep CRED report when available
curl https://api.helixa.xyz/api/terminal/agent/81/deep-cred-report

# Register your agent (SIWA + $1 USDC via x402)
node mint-agent.js "MyAgent" "openclaw"

setup: Public reads need no API key: use the scripts or curl against api.helixa.xyz and helixa.xyz.
Install deps for authenticated/payment flows: `npm install ethers @x402/fetch @x402/evm viem`.
Fund agent wallet with USDC + small Base ETH for paid x402 or direct contract flows.
Generate SIWA auth header by signing the Helixa message with your agent wallet.
